title: Expand text box for meeting notes inside the Emails & Activities feature.
excerpt: Right now, the meeting notes tab inside the Emails & Activities feature is really small, and there’s no way to expand it. It would be great to be able to expand it and make it fill the screen, for note-taking within the …

posts.author: talishlafer (Tali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Right now, the meeting notes tab inside the Emails & Activities feature is really small, and there’s no way to expand it. It would be great to be able to expand it and make it fill the screen, for note-taking within the app.

Use case: I have 3 meetings with each client - a sales meeting, and two meetings once we work together. I want to be able to use the “Meeting” tab to take notes natively in Monday CRM.

As the feature is currently, it ends up being very cumbersome if you have a longer meeting, or tend to take a lot of notes. The text box ends up being too small to actually take notes natively in the app - as soon as more than a few lines are added, it becomes very hard to see the rest of your notes. It’s easier to write your notes in another app, then copy/paste them into the meeting notes tab, but that defeats the purpose of having an all-in-one platform.

It would be great to be able to enlarge the meeting notes inside the Emails & Activities feature, to be able to take and see more notes natively.
